anomalies.title: codesearch depends on repo-local cache wiring in this sandbox
anomalies.description: semantic indexing and search succeed only when HF_HOME, HUGGINGFACE_HUB_CACHE, TRANSFORMERS_CACHE, and SENTENCE_TRANSFORMERS_HOME are pointed at the repo-local .codesearch-local/hf-cache directory

anomalies.title: runtime orchestrator is a hotspot
anomalies.description: internal/cli/runtime_handler.go owns startup, routing, local command handling, slash handling, render dispatch, and cancel/status flows
